use_cases: Form selection with semantic color coding for error/success states
Settings pages requiring visual status indicators
Survey or quiz interfaces with color-coded answer options
Admin dashboards with color-coded selection controls
ai_summary: A color-variant RadioGroup component for selecting from predefined options with semantic color coding (error/destructive, success/approved). Built with Radix UI primitives and styled with Tailwind CSS for consistent cross-platform form selection UI.
